title: Skillmatics Scratch Art Book for Kids - Unicorns & Princesses, Craft Kits & Supplies, 30+ Scratch Stickers, Travel Toys, DIY Kit, Gifts for Girls & Boys Ages 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
features: MAGICAL SCRATCH ART BOOK: Reveal colourful pictures of unicorns and princesses by drawing and scratching over the images! Add to the magic by creating and adding unique scratch-art stickers of rainbows, stars, castles, and more!
INCLUDES: 10 Scratch Pictures, 2 Wooden Styluses, 30+ Scratch Stickers

HOW TO USE: Unleash creativity by scratching the black art paper with the wooden stylus to reveal a colourful world waiting underneath. Then, add to the magic by creating sticker art on vibrant backdrops and discover endless creative possibilities.
TRAVEL-FRIENDLY: The scratch art book is compact and perfect for all kinds of travel - road trips, flights, and train rides, providing hours of creativity and fun.
CHILD-SAFE: Made with high-quality, odorless, and non-toxic materials, this scratch art book is 100% safe for children to use.
MESS-FREE & GREAT GIFT - This scratch art activity is mess-free and makes an ideal gift for children aged 3 to 8 who love unicorns and princesses!
DEVELOPS - Hand-eye Coordination, Creative Expression, Bilateral Hand Coordination
KEY SKILLS - Creative Thinking, Fine Motor, Spatial Reasoning, Focus & Attention
